name: better-agent-terminal
description: Multi-workspace terminal aggregator with Claude Code AI integration

commit.message: Merge branch 'main' of github.com:tony1223/better-agent-terminal

feat: double-Esc to stop, single-Esc to pause and inject messages

- Single Esc interrupts streaming but keeps session alive, allowing
  user to type additional context and resume with Enter
- Double Esc (within 500ms) fully stops and marks tools as error
- Clean up orphaned running tool calls in finally block when
  subprocess crashes unexpectedly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix issue

fix: IME arrow keys, URL backtick trim, ExitPlanMode plan preview

- Skip prompt history navigation when IME is composing (Mac CJK input)
- Strip trailing backticks/quotes from detected URLs
- Show plan file preview in ExitPlanMode permission card with expand button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: persist remote server token across restarts

- Save server token to server-token.json on first start
- Reuse persisted token on subsequent server starts
- Priority: explicit token > persisted token > new random token
- Profiles with saved tokens now work permanently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: /resume returns empty list when SDK listSessions is unavailable

The SDK does not export listSessions, so listSessionsFn is always null.
Previously this caused an early return of [] without reaching the JSONL
fallback parser. Now falls through to the fallback when SDK function is
not available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: planBypass permission error and add debug logging

- Fix planBypass auto-approve missing updatedInput field (SDK Zod validation error)
- Add debug logging for IPC event routing to diagnose multi-session issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resume UI update, per-terminal session tracking, statusbar resume trigger

- Clear messages/meta immediately on /resume so UI reflects the switch
- Remove workspace-level lastSdkSessionId updates (dead code causing confusion with multiple Claude Code terminals)
- Clicking session ID in statusbar now opens resume list instead of copying

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: thumbnail min-height and auto-resume saved session on restart

- Reduce thumbnail card min-height from 60px to 40px to avoid oversized cards
- Auto-resume previously saved SDK session on app restart instead of always starting fresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resume session context, launchProfile scope, session-meta handler, thumbnail min-height

- Only set continue flag when no user prompt on resume, so SDK preserves conversation context
- Move launchProfileId to module scope so IPC handler can access it
- Add claude:get-session-meta to PROXIED_CHANNELS
- Add min-height to terminal thumbnail cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resume session continuation and agent terminal preview

- Pass sdkSessionId to startSession during resume so subsequent messages
  continue the existing conversation instead of creating a new session
- Add claude:message and claude:stream listeners to TerminalThumbnail so
  agent terminals show live conversation preview instead of '$ _'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: profile label, terminal persistence, drag reorder, session ID display

- Fix profile label showing "Default" on startup with try-catch and fallback
- Clear initializedWorkspaces on profile switch to prevent stale terminal state
- Persist terminals on add/remove/init (workspaceStore.save)
- Include terminals in profile snapshot save/load
- Default createDefaultAgentTerminal to true (Claude Code appears by default)
- Add thumbnail drag-and-drop reorder with drop indicator styles
- Show session ID in statusline even before SDK session starts
- Tab key auto-fills prompt suggestion
- Expand PathLinker text extensions and remove canPreview gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Google Apps Script (.gs) file preview support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: DWM hang, session isolation, planBypass mode, file preview open

- Replace blocking alert() with non-blocking in-app notification to prevent DWM hang on profile switch
- Add will-resize throttle (~30fps cap) to reduce DWM pressure during window resize
- Fix new window profile isolation: don't corrupt shared state via setActiveProfileId
- Add planBypass permission mode: plan mode with auto-approved tools, ExitPlanMode requires confirmation
- Fix session ID mixup: remove hidden auto-resume from sdkSessionIds global Map
- New sessions always start fresh; use /resume to manually restore previous sessions
- Show session ID (first 8 chars) in statusline, click to copy
- Add getSessionMeta IPC to refresh metadata when panel becomes active
- Save session ID to profile on every status update for restore via /resume
- Add system file opener button in FilePreviewModal header

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: SDK 0.2.62 upgrade with prompt suggestions, slash autocomplete, account info

- Upgrade Claude Agent SDK from 0.2.47 to 0.2.62
- Enable promptSuggestions: show predicted next prompt as clickable chip above input
- Add slash command autocomplete menu when typing / (SDK commands + built-in /new, /resume, /model)
- Display account info (organization) in status bar footer
- Use graceful interrupt() instead of raw abort() for stop button
- Replace manual JSONL parsing with SDK listSessions() API (with fallback)
- Pass decisionReason from canUseTool to permission request UI
- Add new IPC channels: get-account-info, get-supported-commands, prompt-suggestion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: reduce DWM pressure with GPU compositing disable and resize debounce

- Add disable-gpu-compositing flag to prevent DWM hangs during resize
- Set backgroundThrottling and paintWhenInitiallyHidden on BrowserWindow
- Upgrade terminal resize debounce from rAF (~16ms) to 150ms timeout
- Show active profile name in window title

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: remote profile test connection and startup/switch failure handling

- Add test connection button for remote profiles in ProfilePanel
  (spinner → green check / red X)
- On profile switch to remote: if connection fails, show error and
  fall back to local profile instead of hanging
- On startup: try connecting to active remote profile; fall back to
  local profile on failure (close window if no local profile exists)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: abort error leak, ask-user card overflow, remote profile startup hang

- Broaden abort error detection to suppress "aborted by user" messages
  that leaked through when interrupting a running query
- Make AskUserQuestion card scrollable (max-height 60vh) with sticky
  submit button so it stays reachable with many questions
- Fall back to local profile on startup when active profile is remote,
  preventing hang from unreachable remote server

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve resumeId scoping bug and upgrade claude-code CLI to 2.1.49

Move resumeId declaration outside try block so it's accessible in catch
for retry logic. Upgrade @anthropic-ai/claude-code from 2.1.42 to 2.1.49
to fix --thinking unknown option error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add /new command to reset Claude session

Type /new in the chat input to clear conversation and start a fresh
session while preserving cwd, permission mode, effort, and 1M context
settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: upgrade SDK to 0.2.47, add effort dropdown and 1M context toggle

- Upgrade @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk from 0.2.42 to 0.2.47
- Migrate deprecated maxThinkingTokens to thinking: { type: 'adaptive' }
- Remove setMaxThinkingTokens runtime toggle (deprecated)
- Add effort level dropdown (low/medium/high/max) per session
- Add 1M context window toggle (Sonnet beta) with settings persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: send image data URLs instead of file paths for remote proxy support

Images attached via drag-drop or clipboard were sent as local file paths
to claude:send-message. When proxied to a remote Mac server, those Windows
paths don't exist, causing images to be silently dropped. Now the frontend
sends base64 data URLs directly, which work regardless of local/remote mode.

BREAKING: Both client and server must be updated together (v1.41.0+).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: support Mac/Linux file paths in PathLinker

PATH_RE now matches Unix absolute paths starting with /Users, /home,
/tmp, /var, /opt, /etc, /usr, /mnt, /srv, /root in addition to
Windows C:\ paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: persist terminals and per-terminal SDK session IDs in profiles

- Save/restore terminal instances (id, type, agentPreset, cwd,
  sdkSessionId) alongside workspaces so profiles remember exact
  terminal layout
- Add sdkSessionId field to TerminalInstance for per-terminal
  Claude session tracking (replaces single per-workspace ID)
- Restored terminals reuse saved PTY/agent config instead of
  recreating defaults from settings
- Each Claude agent terminal auto-resumes its own SDK session

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: open profile in new window when switching

Add "New Window" option to the profile switch dialog. Spawns a new app
instance with --profile=<id> argument so the target profile loads in a
separate window without closing terminals in the current one.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: allow editing remote profile connection settings

Add update API to ProfileManager for modifying remoteHost, remotePort,
and remoteToken on existing profiles. Remote profiles now show a gear
icon to edit connection details without recreating the profile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: throttle resize handlers to prevent lag during window resize

- Debounce TerminalPanel ResizeObserver via requestAnimationFrame so
  fitAddon.fit() + pty.resize() fire at most once per frame
- Batch ResizeHandle mousemove deltas into rAF callbacks, reducing
  state updates and re-renders during panel drag

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: default to bypassPermissions to prevent agent stuck at thinking

Sessions now always start with bypassPermissions mode regardless of
the allowBypassPermissions setting. Users can manually cycle to other
modes if needed. This prevents the common "stuck at thinking" issue
where the agent waits for permission approval the user doesn't notice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent empty text blocks in Claude API messages

Use single space fallback when prompt is empty to prevent API errors
for both "text content blocks must be non-empty" and "cache_control
cannot be set for empty text blocks".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: allow image-only messages without text to Claude API

Skip the text content block when prompt is empty to avoid
"text content blocks must be non-empty" API error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: permissionMode timing, IME composition, remote null args, and SDK upgrade

- Pass permissionMode from frontend during startSession to fix "stuck at thinking" on Mac
- Add isComposing guard on Enter key to prevent send during IME composition
- Strip trailing null args in remote-server to fix git over remote proxy
- Upgrade SDK to 0.2.42/2.1.42

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: remote proxy system and image-only message support

- Add WebSocket-based remote proxy (server + client) for LAN control
- Refactor IPC handlers into handler registry pattern for transparent routing
- Add broadcast hub for event forwarding to remote clients
- Extend profile system with remote profile type (host/port/token)
- Add Remote Access section in Settings (start/stop server, token, clients)
- Add remote connection indicator in sidebar
- Allow sending image-only messages in Claude agent panel
- Bump version to 1.38.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add profile system for workspace management

Profiles allow saving and switching between different sets of workspaces.
Auto-migrates existing workspaces into a Default profile on first use.
Includes profile CRUD (create, rename, duplicate, delete), switch with
save confirmation, and sidebar profile badge indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
chore: bump version to 1.37.0

feat: clickable URLs in messages and group filter reactivity fix

- LinkedText now tokenizes markdown links [text](url) and bare URLs
- URLs open in default browser via shell.openExternal
- Assistant messages and streaming text now use LinkedText
- Fix sidebar not updating when switching workspace group filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
chore: bump version to 1.36.0

feat: detachable workspaces, token stats fix, context menu bounds, and prompt history

- Detachable workspace windows: right-click → Detach to Window, auto-reattach on restart
- Multi-window IPC broadcast: PtyManager and ClaudeAgentManager now broadcast to all windows
- Fix token statistics double-counting: use modelUsage (cumulative) instead of += on usage
- Context menu viewport boundary clamping to prevent overflow at bottom of screen
- Prompt history modal: view and copy all user prompts from statusline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Ctrl+P file picker, PathLinker search/copy, and git untracked files fix

- Add Ctrl+P quick open dialog to search and preview workspace files
- Add Ctrl+F search with match highlighting and navigation in file preview modal
- Add copy path button and clickable path in file preview header
- Export FilePreviewModal for reuse across components
- Fix git status to use -uall flag showing individual untracked files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: active tasks bar, content modal, TaskOutput renderer, thinking auto-scroll, and compaction notification

- Active Tasks indicator bar showing running Tasks with pulsing dot, description, and live elapsed time (mm:ss); clickable to scroll to task
- Generalized content modal (Plan/Task Prompt/Task Result/TaskOutput) with scrollable overlay, replacing inline plan expansion
- Custom TaskOutput renderer with parent Task badge linking and "from Task" scroll-to navigation
- Task renderer improvements: elapsed time display on running tasks, "View prompt/result" modal buttons for long content
- Streaming thinking auto-scroll fix: inner <pre> container now scrolls to bottom during active streaming
- Context compaction notification: handles SDK 'compact' message type, strips ANSI codes, shows system message
- data-tool-id attributes on Task/TaskOutput/generic tool items for scroll targeting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: message archiving to disk, main process memory cap, and workspace-level session rest/wake

- Archive renderer messages to JSONL when exceeding 300, keep 200 in memory, load-more button to retrieve archived
- Cap main process session.state.messages at 300 to prevent memory leak
- Add Rest/Wake Agent in workspace context menu to manually release Claude subprocess resources
- Fix duplicate git: key in preload (getGithubUrl was silently overwritten)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: file browser search/context menu, Edit diff view, GitHub link, and UI refinements

- Add file search with debounced recursive lookup and flat result display
- Add right-click context menu on files: Copy Relative/Absolute Path, Open in Explorer
- Add "Open on GitHub" to workspace context menu (auto-detects GitHub remote)
- Add Edit/Write tool diff renderer with red/green line display and collapse toggle
- Change model button from cycle to list selector, move attachment to send area
- Remove duplicate $ cost display (already in statusline)
- Restore bypass permission mode after exiting plan mode when setting is enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: custom Task tool renderer and interrupted tool red dot indicator

Add structured Task tool display with collapsible PROMPT/RESULT sections,
subagent metadata badges, and truncated prompt preview. Mark running tool
calls as interrupted (red dot) when session is stopped during pending
permission instead of letting the breathing animation disappear.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: CSS modular split, sticky pinned messages, image error fix, task tool display, and mode change detection

Split main.css (3840 lines) into 12 modular CSS files for better maintainability and reduced token consumption. Add sticky pinned user messages overlay using IntersectionObserver to keep context when scrolled up. Fix image 400 error with try-catch and size limits. Improve Task tool call display with subagent_type badge. Add plan mode exit detection via IPC. Fix PathLinker .output detection and code preview line number alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: line numbers, input perf, process cleanup, auto-bypass, and UI polish

- Add line numbers to file preview (HighlightedCode table layout)
- Fix input lag by switching textarea to uncontrolled ref-based input
- Fix background processes remaining after window close (killAll + process.exit fallback)
- Auto-apply bypassPermissions mode if enabled in settings
- Unify timestamp alignment to right side
- Fix scroll-to-bottom button position (sticky inside messages, no overlap with prompt)
- Fix path link color contrast on dark background (#e0a870)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: smart scroll, timestamps, syntax highlighting, immediate message send, and system-reminder separation

- Stop auto-scroll when user is reading history; add scroll-to-bottom button
- Show timestamps on all messages (user, assistant, system, tools); full date for cross-day messages
- Render TodoWrite as visual checklist instead of raw JSON
- Add syntax highlighting (highlight.js) to file preview modal and FileTree preview
- Send new messages immediately by aborting current query instead of waiting in queue
- Show IN/OUT tool blocks as full multiline content
- Extract <system-reminder> from OUT into collapsible SYS row
- Only pass lastSdkSessionId to first agent terminal (new terminals start fresh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add workspace tabs (Terminal/Files/Git), file browser with preview, git log/diff viewer, and clickable file paths

- Add top tab bar in WorkspaceView: Terminal | Files | Git
- Files tab: split layout with lazy-loaded directory tree (left) and file preview (right)
  - Text file preview for .ts/.js/.css/.json/.md etc.
  - Image preview for .png/.jpg/.gif/.webp
  - fs:readdir and fs:readFile IPC handlers
- Git tab: 3-column layout (commit log | changed files | diff)
  - git:log, git:diff, git:diff-files, git:status IPC handlers
  - Diff/File toggle to view full file content
  - Colored diff display (+green, -red, @@blue)
  - New/untracked files render as full-file additions
- PathLinker: detect Windows file paths in Claude agent output
  - Clickable links open file preview modal
  - Applied to tool IN/OUT content in ClaudeAgentPanel
- Bump version to 1.28.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: preserve thinking blocks, input history, terminal focus, and context menu improvements

- Preserve thinking content in assistant messages instead of discarding on finalize
- Extract thinking blocks from SDK content array in backend
- Fallback: attach streaming thinking to message if backend didn't provide it
- Add input history (ArrowUp/ArrowDown) in Claude agent prompt box
- Fix terminal focus: pass isActive prop to TerminalPanel on tab switch
- Add "Open in Explorer" to workspace right-click context menu (shell.openPath)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: fix bypass permissions, add message queue, process cleanup, auto-resume, and activity indicator improvements

- Fix bypassPermissions: use session's permissionMode instead of hardcoded 'default', add allowDangerouslySkipPermissions flag
- Add message queue: queue messages sent during streaming instead of rejecting, auto-process after completion
- Fix process leak: call queryInstance.close() on dispose, add before-quit safety handler
- Fix auto-resume: load session history from JSONL on app restart when savedSdkSessionId exists
- Add Shift+Tab to cycle permission modes from prompt box
- Add /model command to select from available models with picker UI
- Connect Claude agent events (stream, message, toolUse, toolResult) to breathing light activity indicator
- Add pending action indicator: red breathing light with '?' badge when permission/ask-user confirmation is needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve Claude Code ASAR packaging issue causing exit code 1

The Claude Code CLI and SDK were packed inside app.asar by electron-builder,
but child_process.spawn cannot execute files inside ASAR archives. Added
asarUnpack config and app.asar→app.asar.unpacked path resolution. Also added
stderr capture, resume-failure auto-retry, and improved error diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: bump version to 1.26.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'feat/claude-sdk-agent'

feat: add workspace group filter and related UI improvements

- Add group filter dropdown in sidebar to filter workspaces by group
- Add "Set Group" option in workspace context menu with inline editing
- Display group name prefix in workspace folder label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add /resume command, thinking display, and status line

- Add /resume command to list and resume historical Claude SDK sessions
- Read JSONL session files from ~/.claude/projects/ for history replay
- Display thinking blocks with collapsible toggle, auto-expand after first open
- Add status line below prompt: git branch, model, context %, cost, tokens, turns
- Enable extended thinking with maxThinkingTokens: 31999
- Persist lastSdkSessionId on workspace for auto-resume on next launch
- Filter noise messages (Unknown skill, No response requested) from history
- Fix layout overlap with block layout for timeline items
- Add try-catch guards on SDK control methods to prevent crashes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add @anthropic-ai/claude-code dependency and resolve CLI path

The SDK requires the claude-code package for its CLI executable.
Added it as a dependency and explicitly set pathToClaudeCodeExecutable
in query options to avoid path resolution failures in Electron.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Claude SDK agent panel with status bar

Integrate Claude Agent SDK for native chat UI with tool call display
and a compact status bar showing model, session ID, cost, tokens,
turns, and duration. The status bar updates in real-time from SDK
system.init and result messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add prompt box for Claude Code agent terminals (hidden by default)

- Add PromptBox component with multi-line textarea, Ctrl+Enter to send,
  image paste support via clipboard IPC, and input history (up/down arrows)
- Add toggle button in MainPanel header for Claude Code terminals
- Add Electron clipboard IPC handlers (saveImage, writeImage)
- Prompt box hidden by default, toggle with header button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: improve Windows font rendering and collapse snippet sidebar by default

Use platform-aware default fonts (Cascadia Code on Windows, SF Mono on macOS)
and strengthen fallback chains to prevent xterm.js character clipping issues.
Snippet sidebar now defaults to collapsed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add system resume detection and login shell for macOS/Linux

- Listen for powerMonitor 'resume' event to detect system wake from sleep
- Send 'system:resume' IPC to renderer for handling stale connections
- Use login shell (-l -i) on macOS/Linux for proper env var loading

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add cross-platform shell support for macOS/Linux

Add zsh, bash, and sh shell options for macOS/Linux users. The settings
panel now dynamically shows platform-appropriate shell options instead
of only Windows shells.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: add NSIS installer to Windows release artifacts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add NSIS installer and update Claude default command

- Add NSIS installer target for Windows with proper shortcut settings
- Change productName/executableName to BetterAgentTerminal (no spaces)
- Update Claude Code default command to 'claude --continue'

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: bump version to 1.25.1223140643

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add workspace settings, agent terminal defaults, and UI improvements

- Add adjustable sidebar width with ResizeHandle
- Move workspace env vars and close to right-click context menu
- Restore workspace drag and drop reordering
- Add + button in ThumbnailBar header for adding terminals
- Add default terminal count setting (1-5)
- Add createDefaultAgentTerminal setting
- Add default agent selector (Claude, Gemini, Codex)
- Add auto-run agent command option
- Fix terminal lazy initialization (only when workspace active)
- Fix cross-workspace terminal mixing with module-level tracking
- Fix thumbnailTerminals to show all terminals except focused one

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'main' of github.com:tony1223/better-agent-terminal

commit.message:
feat: add resizable and collapsible panels

- Add ResizeHandle component for drag-to-resize functionality
- Add CollapsedBar component for collapsed icon bar state
- Snippet Sidebar: resizable width (180-500px), collapsible to 40px icon bar
- ThumbnailBar: resizable height (80-400px), collapsible to 40px icon bar
- Double-click resize handle to reset to default size
- Persist panel settings (width/height, collapsed state) in localStorage

chore: bump version to 1.25.1222113936 and sync lock file

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

chore: bump version to 1.25.1222113628

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Merge branch 'main' into feature/snippet-sidebar-and-ui-improvements

commit.message:
feat: add snippet sidebar, workspace env vars, and UI improvements

Features:
- Snippet sidebar with search (yellow highlight), double-click paste, auto-execute
- Workspace-specific environment variables (⚙ button in sidebar)
- Global environment variables in Settings
- Terminal title editable via double-click
- Dark theme scrollbar styling
- Search results highlighted with yellow border

Bug Fixes:
- Fixed terminal display when default agent is 'none'
- Fixed thumbnail bar switching (now shows all terminals)
- Fixed terminal initialization logic

Improvements:

commit.message:
feat: add font family selection in Settings

- Add FontType and FONT_OPTIONS to types
- Add font detection using document.fonts.check() API
- Add font family dropdown with availability indicators
- Add custom font input option
- Add live preview in Settings panel
- Apply font settings to terminal and thumbnails in real-time
- Filter PUA/Braille/Box characters in thumbnails to fix box rendering

fix: strip all ANSI escape sequences in terminal thumbnails

Replace simple color-only regex with comprehensive stripAnsi function
that handles CSI, OSC, DCS sequences and other control characters.

fix: only set default focus for active workspace

Prevents inactive workspaces from overriding the active workspace's
focused terminal when all workspaces are rendered simultaneously.

readme_html:
Better Agent Terminal

A cross-platform terminal aggregator with multi-workspace support and Claude Code integration

Download Latest Release

Screenshot

Features

Workspace Management

  • Multi-Workspace — Organize terminals by project folders
  • Drag & Drop — Reorder workspaces freely
  • Groups — Categorize workspaces with filter dropdown
  • Detachable Windows — Pop out workspaces to separate windows, auto-reattach on restart
  • Per-Workspace Env Vars — Configure environment variables per workspace
  • Activity Indicators — See which workspaces have running terminals
  • Double-click to rename, right-click context menu for all actions

Terminal

  • Google Meet-style layout — 70% main panel + 30% thumbnail bar
  • Multiple terminals per workspace — xterm.js with full Unicode/CJK support
  • Tab navigation — Terminal / Files / Git views
  • File browser — Search, navigate, preview files with syntax highlighting
  • Git integration — Diff viewer, branch display, untracked files, GitHub link detection
  • Snippet manager — Save, organize, and paste code snippets

Claude Code Agent

  • Built-in Claude Code via SDK — no separate terminal needed
  • Message streaming with extended thinking (collapsible)
  • Permission-based tool execution with bypass mode
  • Active tasks bar — See running operations with elapsed time
  • Session resume — Persist and resume conversations across restarts
  • Rest/Wake sessions — Pause and resume agent sessions from context menu
  • Statusline — Token usage, cost, context window %, model, git branch, duration
  • Prompt history — View and copy all user prompts from statusline
  • Image attachment — Drag-drop or button (max 5 images)
  • Clickable URLs — Markdown links and bare URLs open in default browser
  • Clickable file paths — Preview files with syntax highlighting, search (Ctrl+F)
  • Ctrl+P file picker — Search and attach files to context

Keyboard Shortcuts

Shortcut Action
Ctrl+P / Cmd+P File picker (search & attach files)
Shift+Tab Switch between Terminal and Agent mode
Enter Send message
Shift+Enter Insert newline (multiline input)
Escape Stop streaming / close modal
Ctrl+Shift+C Copy selected text
Ctrl+Shift+V Paste from clipboard
Right-click Copy (if selected) or Paste

Slash Commands

Command Description
/resume Resume a previous Claude session
/model Switch between available models

Quick Start

Option 1: Download Release

Download from Releases for your platform:

Platform Format
Windows NSIS installer, .zip
macOS .dmg (universal binary)
Linux .AppImage

macOS DMG installation:

  1. Download the .dmg file from Releases
  2. Double-click the .dmg to mount it
  3. Drag Better Agent Terminal into the Applications folder
  4. On first launch, macOS may block the app — go to System Settings > Privacy & Security, scroll down and click Open Anyway
  5. Make sure Claude Code CLI is installed (npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code)

Option 2: Build from Source

Prerequisites:

  • Node.js 18+
  • Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated
git clone https://github.com/tony1223/better-agent-terminal.git
cd better-agent-terminal
npm install

Development mode:

npm run dev

Build for production:

npm run build

macOS Build Notes

Native dependencies (node-pty, better-sqlite3) require Xcode Command Line Tools:

xcode-select --install

Then:

npm install
npm run dev      # Development
npm run build    # Build .dmg

Architecture

better-agent-terminal/
├── electron/
│   ├── main.ts                 # Electron main process, window management
│   ├── preload.ts              # IPC bridge
│   ├── pty-manager.ts          # PTY process management (multi-window broadcast)
│   └── claude-agent-manager.ts # Claude SDK session management
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── Sidebar.tsx         # Workspace list, groups, context menu
│   │   ├── WorkspaceView.tsx   # Main workspace container
│   │   ├── ClaudeAgentPanel.tsx# Claude Code agent UI
│   │   ├── TerminalPanel.tsx   # xterm.js terminal
│   │   ├── ThumbnailBar.tsx    # Terminal thumbnail list
│   │   ├── PathLinker.tsx      # Clickable paths & URLs, file preview modal
│   │   └── SnippetSidebar.tsx  # Snippet manager
│   ├── stores/
│   │   ├── workspace-store.ts  # Workspace state management
│   │   └── settings-store.ts   # App settings
│   ├── types/
│   │   ├── index.ts            # Core types
│   │   └── claude-agent.ts     # Claude message types
│   └── styles/
│       ├── main.css
│       ├── claude-agent.css
│       └── path-linker.css
└── package.json

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript
  • Terminal: xterm.js + node-pty
  • Framework: Electron 28
  • AI: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
  • Build: Vite + electron-builder
  • Storage: better-sqlite3

Configuration

Workspaces and settings are saved to:

Platform Path
Windows %APPDATA%/better-agent-terminal/
macOS ~/Library/Application Support/better-agent-terminal/
Linux ~/.config/better-agent-terminal/

Release

Version Format

Version follows: 1.YY.MMDDHHmmss

Example: v1.25.1219091538 = 2025-12-19 09:15:38

Automated Release (GitHub Actions)

Push a tag to trigger builds for all platforms:

git tag v1.37.0
git push origin v1.37.0

License

MIT License - see LICENSE for details.

Author

TonyQ - @tony1223

Contributors

  • lmanchu - @lmanchu - macOS/Linux support, workspace roles
  • bluewings1211 - @bluewings1211 - Shift+Enter newline, preserve workspace state, font settings

Built with Claude Code
